title: Positive flow: Navigate to the profile section from the navigation bar
test_steps: Click on the 'people' icon in the navigation bar.
expected_result: The user should be navigated to the profile section.

title: Negative flow: Attempt to navigate to an invalid section from the navigation bar
test_steps: Click on the 'dots' icon in the navigation bar.
expected_result: The app should not navigate to an invalid section.

title: UI test: Verify the status bar icons and time
test_steps: Observe the status bar icons and time.
expected_result: The status bar icons and time should be displayed correctly.

title: Usability test: Search functionality
test_steps: Click on the 'Search..' text in the search bar. | Type 'Test call' in the search bar and press enter.
expected_result: The search results should display the 'Test call' entry.

title: Accessibility test: Verify navigation bar icons are accessible
test_steps: Use screen reader to navigate through the navigation bar icons.
expected_result: All navigation bar icons should be accessible via screen reader.
